name: Maple Syrup Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk the cold water with flour until smooth.
2. Stir the mixture into the maple syrup in a small, heavy saucepan.
3. Stir in the lightly beaten egg and cook over medium-low heat, stirring constantly, until thickened, about 7 minutes.
4. Stir in the melted butter until combined.
5. Pour the filling into the prepared pie shell.
6. Let cool.
